body.title: Inference proxy: Models registry with current pricing
body.result: Built in 715eca0a — sources/models/rules/health all in devices/inference/, 14 tests passing
body.description:
Model catalog seeded with current OR models and tiers. Each entry: model_id, provider, input_cost_per_1m, output_cost_per_1m, context_window, tier (minion/worker/analyst/designer), tags. Seeded with: qwen/qwen3.5-9b (minion $0.04), deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash (worker $0.10), qwen/qwen3.6-35b-a3b (analyst $0.14), claude-haiku-4-5 (designer). Registry is data (JSON/DB), not code.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/ (models_registry.py + seed data)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: registry CRUD, tier enum, seed data. Out of scope: routing, health.
**Completion criteria:** Can query registry for cheapest model in a tier. Seed data loads on device start.
